name: Battle Fury
description: The bearer of this mighty axe gains the ability to cut down swaths of enemies at once.

abilities.name: Chop Tree
abilities.description: Instantly destroys the targeted tree. Cooldown: 4. Cast Range: 350.

abilities.name: Quell
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack damage against non-hero units. Attack Damage Bonus: 8. Attack Damage Bonus: 4.

abilities.name: Cleave
abilities.description: Deals a percentage of the wielder's attack damage as physical damage in a cone in front of the wielder on each attack. Starting Radius: 150. Distance: 650. End Radius: 360. Cleave Damage: 60%. Cleave Damage: 40%. Deals less damage against non-hero units.
